CustomMetadata.label: AA-001 - Apex class uses without sharing

values.value: Apex class uses without sharing with DML

One or more Apex classes declare without sharing and contain DML operations. These classes bypass record-level sharing rules when performing data writes. This is a heuristic check - manual code review required to confirm.
Classes using without sharing bypass all record-level security when performing DML. An Apex bug or injection vulnerability in these classes exposes every record in the org.
Add with sharing where possible. Use without sharing only in framework classes with no direct user input and no user-context DML. Document each exception with a code comment.
